hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭；【CRYPTO】以太坊飙升 10%，随着 ETF 需求和比特矿购买增加，引领加密货币反弹；【CRYPTO】随着 ETF 和策略的积累，比特币在全球动荡中跑赢黄金和股票。

items.title: Markets' hopes for Fed interest rate cuts are rapidly fading away
items.summary: As both energy prices and inflation fears pop higher, expectations for cuts are sliding lower.
items.title_zh: 市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭
items.summary_zh: 随着能源价格和通胀担忧的加剧，削减开支的预期正在下降。

items.title: Ether surges 10%, leading crypto rebound as ETF demand, Bitmine buying pick up
items.summary: Fresh ETF inflows, digital asset treasury buying and a shift away from bitcoin to altcoins are helping lift the second-largest cryptocurrency.
items.title_zh: 以太坊飙升 10%，随着 ETF 需求和比特矿购买增加，引领加密货币反弹
items.summary_zh: 新的 ETF 流入、数字资产国债购买以及从比特币向山寨币的转变正在帮助提振第二大加密货币。

items.title: Bitcoin outperforms gold and stocks in global turmoil as ETFs and Strategy accumulate
items.summary: Wall Street broker Bernstein took note of an institutional ownership shift as behind bitcoin's resilience during this latest bout of global turmoil.
items.title_zh: 随着 ETF 和策略的积累，比特币在全球动荡中跑赢黄金和股票
items.summary_zh: 华尔街经纪人伯恩斯坦注意到，在最近一轮全球动荡中，机构所有权的转变是比特币韧性的背后原因。

items.title: Tom Lee’s BitMine boosts Ethereum treasury near 4.6 million ETH as cryptos post ‘meaningful outperformance’ during Iran war
items.summary: BitMine Chairman Tom Lee pointed to crypto's outperformance during tension in the Middle East as the firm accelerated Ethereum purchases.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 的 BitMine 使以太坊金库增加了近 460 万 ETH，因为加密货币在伊朗战争期间表现出“有意义的优异表现”
items.summary_zh: BitMine 董事长 Tom Lee 指出，随着该公司加速购买以太坊，加密货币在中东紧张局势期间表现出色。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase reins in lending to private credit firms after marking down software loans
items.summary: JPMorgan's move shows that the biggest U.S. bank by assets wants to get ahead of potential turbulence involving private credit loans to software companies.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通在降低软件贷款后限制向私人信贷公司提供贷款
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，按资产计算，这家美国最大的银行希望在涉及向软件公司提供私人信贷贷款的潜在动荡之前先行一步。

items.title: In Iraq, the U.S. Tried to Bring Allies on Board. Not in Iran.
items.summary: This time, President Trump went to war without preparing the public, seeking U.N. approval or even consulting allies. But they will have to pick up the pieces.
items.title_zh: 在伊拉克，美国试图拉拢盟友。不在伊朗。
items.summary_zh: 这一次，特朗普总统在没有让公众做好准备、没有寻求联合国批准、甚至没有咨询盟友的情况下就发动了战争。但他们必须收拾残局。

items.title: The War Is Making It Harder to Keep the Lights On, 2,000 Miles Away
items.summary: Bangladesh is taking steps to conserve electricity, which its factories need to keep stitching together the world’s clothing.
items.title_zh: 战争使得 2,000 英里外的照明变得更加困难
items.summary_zh: 孟加拉国正在采取措施节约电力，该国工厂需要电力来不断缝制世界各地的服装。

items.title: Bitcoin beat the S&P 500, Nasdaq Composite and gold since the start of the Iran war
items.summary: ProShares' Simeon Hyman is highlighting a bullish bitcoin trend.
items.title_zh: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，比特币击败了标准普尔 500 指数、纳斯达克综合指数和黄金
items.summary_zh: ProShares 的 Simeon Hyman 强调了看涨的比特币趋势。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says He Wants to Delay Visit to China Because of Conflict
items.summary: “I think it’s important that I be here,” President Trump said of asking China to reschedule a summit. Earlier, he disparaged allies for failing to embrace his request for help to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普称因冲突而推迟访华
items.summary_zh: “我认为我来这里很重要，”特朗普总统在谈到要求中国重新安排峰会时说道。早些时候，他贬低盟友未能接受他提出的帮助重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的请求。

items.title: Man accuses wife of using CCTV cameras to steal $172 million bitcoin from his hardware wallet
items.summary: The alleged theft of 2,323 bitcoin has triggered a High Court dispute testing how English property law applies to digital assets.
items.title_zh: 男子指控妻子使用闭路电视摄像头从他的硬件钱包中窃取了价值 1.72 亿美元的比特币
items.summary_zh: 涉嫌盗窃 2,323 枚比特币引发了高等法院的一场争议，测试英国财产法如何适用于数字资产。

items.title: OpenSea delays highly anticipated token launch, citing challenging crypto market conditions
items.summary: The platform will end its rewards waves, offer optional fee refunds for certain traders and introduce 0% token trading fees for 60 days starting March 31 as it promotes its revamped marketplace.
items.title_zh: OpenSea 推迟了备受期待的代币发行，理由是加密货币市场条件充满挑战
items.summary_zh: 该平台将结束其奖励浪潮，为某些交易者提供可选的费用退款，并从 3 月 31 日开始，在 60 天内引入 0% 的代币交易费用，以推广其改造后的市场。

items.title: ‘Crypto strikes back’: Bitcoin decouples from stocks to tap $74K as institutional demand returns despite energy-driven market turmoil
items.summary: Bitcoin surged above $74,000 on Monday as institutional inflows, energy supply, and geopolitical tensions impacted crypto demand.
items.title_zh: “加密货币反击”：尽管能源驱动的市场动荡，但机构需求回归，比特币与股票脱钩，触及 7.4 万美元
items.summary_zh: 由于机构资金流入、能源供应和地缘政治紧张局势影响了加密货币需求，比特币周一飙升至 74,000 美元以上。

items.title: US Secret Service, UK and Canada launch Operation Atlantic targeting crypto approval phishing scams
items.summary: The U.S. Secret Service is participating in a multinational operation targeting crypto approval-phishing scams.
items.title_zh: 美国特勤局、英国和加拿大发起大西洋行动，针对加密货币审批网络钓鱼诈骗
items.summary_zh: 美国特勤局正在参与一项针对加密货币审批网络钓鱼诈骗的跨国行动。

items.title: Apollo's John Zito questions private equity's software valuations: 'All the marks are wrong'
items.summary: While Wall Street figures have flagged risks in private credit, Apollo's Zito is among the first within private credit to candidly acknowledge weakness.
items.title_zh: Apollo 的 John Zito 质疑私募股权公司的软件估值：“所有标记都是错误的”
items.summary_zh: 尽管华尔街的数据已经指出了私人信贷的风险，但阿波罗的 Zito 是私人信贷领域最先坦诚承认疲软的人之一。

items.title: Holiday spending, export demand drive China’s economic momentum as Iran war headwinds loom
items.summary: Beijing tamped down its GDP growth target this year to a range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal on record going back to the early 1990s.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争逆风逼近，假期消费、出口需求推动中国经济增长
items.summary_zh: 北京将今年的GDP增长目标下调至4.5%至5%，这是自20世纪90年代初以来有记录以来最不雄心勃勃的目标。

items.title: Dividend stocks are catching up to tech stocks on a key earnings metric at a critical time for the market
items.summary: Dividend stocks are closing the earnings growth gap with tech stocks, a reason for investors seeking safety in a volatile market to favor income opportunities.
items.title_zh: 在市场的关键时刻，股息股在一项关键盈利指标上正在追赶科技股
items.summary_zh: 股息股正在缩小与科技股的盈利增长差距，这是投资者在动荡的市场中寻求安全以青睐收入机会的原因。

items.title: Inside JPMorgan Chase's push to become the startup world’s new Silicon Valley Bank
items.summary: For JPMorgan Chase, winning the niche of startup banking from rivals is about more than just gaining deposits: It's a bet to future-proof the largest U.S. bank.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通致力于成为初创企业界的新硅谷银行
items.summary_zh: 对于摩根大通来说，从竞争对手手中赢得初创银行业务的利基市场不仅仅是获得存款：这是对美国最大银行面向未来的赌注。

items.title: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis
items.summary: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war is not really an option.
items.title_zh: 警惕的盟友表明特朗普的伊朗危机没有快速解决办法
items.summary_zh: 欧洲领导人对于帮助特朗普确保霍尔木兹海峡的安全犹豫不决，但他们知道对伊朗战争不采取行动并不是真正的选择。

items.title: 'My mother cried out one last time': Palestinian boy, 12, describes how Israeli forces killed his family in car
items.summary: Khaled Bani Odeh's parents and two brothers were shot dead as they drove home from a shopping trip in the occupied West Bank.
items.title_zh: “我母亲最后一次哭了”：12 岁的巴勒斯坦男孩描述以色列军队如何在车里杀害他的家人
items.summary_zh: 哈立德·巴尼·奥德 (Khaled Bani Odeh) 的父母和两个兄弟在被占领的约旦河西岸购物后开车回家时被枪杀。

items.title: Ecuador deploys 75,000 soldiers and police to combat drug gangs
items.summary: Citizens of the most violent-wracked provinces have been warned the government is "at war" with the gangs.
items.title_zh: 厄瓜多尔部署75,000名士兵和警察打击贩毒团伙
items.summary_zh: 暴力最严重省份的公民已收到警告，政府正在与犯罪团伙“交战”。

items.title: What Do Africans Think of Trump’s Travel Ban List?
items.summary: The restrictions on half the continent have been called racist and unfair. “We don’t come to the United States because we’re running away,” one N.B.A. fan said.
items.title_zh: 非洲人如何看待特朗普的旅行禁令清单？
items.summary_zh: 对半个大陆的限制被称为种族主义和不公平。 “我们来美国不是因为我们要逃跑，”一位 NBA 球员说。范说。

items.title: Intrigue, Power Plays and Rivalries: Inside the Rise of Mojtaba Khamenei
items.summary: The weeklong fight over Iran’s next leader pitted the Revolutionary Guards against moderates. The generals won, but only over spirited resistance.
items.title_zh: 阴谋、权力斗争和竞争：莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊崛起的内部
items.summary_zh: 围绕伊朗下一任领导人的为期一周的斗争让革命卫队与温和派展开了对立。将军们赢得了胜利，但只是战胜了激烈的抵抗。

items.title: Cuba Ready to Accept Outside Investment, Top Official Says
items.summary: President Trump’s words came amid a nationwide blackout and as a top Cuban official said his country would move to open the economy to foreign investors.
items.title_zh: 高级官员称古巴准备接受外部投资
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统发表此番言论之际，古巴全国范围内停电，一名古巴高级官员表示，古巴将采取行动向外国投资者开放经济。

items.title: How the Makers of ‘Mr. Nobody Against Putin’ Addressed ‘an Ethical Minefield’
items.summary: The documentary about Vladimir V. Putin’s wartime indoctrination of Russian schoolchildren won an Oscar at Sunday’s Academy Awards.
items.title_zh: 《先生》的制作者如何没有人反对普京解决“道德雷区”
items.summary_zh: 这部关于弗拉基米尔·V·普京 (Vladimir V. Putin) 战时对俄罗斯学童进行洗脑的纪录片在周日的奥斯卡颁奖典礼上获得了奥斯卡奖。

items.title: Norway Celebrates Oscar Win for Joachim Trier’s ‘Sentimental Value’
items.summary: “Sentimental Value,” set in Oslo, was named best international feature film. After a slew of negative news in Norway, it was a welcome victory.
items.title_zh: 挪威庆祝约阿希姆·特里尔的《情感价值》荣获奥斯卡奖
items.summary_zh: 以奥斯陆为背景的《情感价值》被评为最佳国际故事片。在挪威出现一系列负面消息之后，这是一场可喜的胜利。

items.title: Pakistani-Afghan War Takes Heavy Toll on Civilians
items.summary: Pakistani airstrikes have killed at least 75 civilians and displaced 115,000 in Afghanistan, with both sides vowing escalation and no talks in sight.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦-阿富汗战争造成大量平民伤亡
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦的空袭已造成阿富汗至少 75 名平民死亡，11.5 万人流离失所，双方都誓言升级，而且看不到任何谈判的迹象。

items.title: AI-linked crypto tokens surge as Nvidia's Jensen Huang touts agentic future
items.summary: CEO Jensen Huang predicted $1 trillion in chip demand through 2027 and praised OpenClaw and the rapid rise of agentic AI systems.
items.title_zh: 随着 Nvidia 的 Jensen Huang 吹捧代理未来，与人工智能相关的加密代币激增
items.summary_zh: 首席执行官黄仁勋 (Jensen Huang) 预测到 2027 年芯片需求将达到 1 万亿美元，并赞扬了 OpenClaw 和代理人工智能系统的快速崛起。

items.title: T. Rowe Price is ready to put dogecoin, shiba inu among tokens in its new crypto ETF
items.summary: The amended SEC filing details the assets, custody arrangements and potential staking plans for the actively managed crypto fund.
items.title_zh: T. Rowe Price 准备将狗狗币、柴犬等代币纳入其新的加密 ETF
items.summary_zh: 修订后的 SEC 文件详细介绍了主动管理型加密基金的资产、托管安排和潜在的质押计划。

items.title: Circle is up 100% in a month: Why this stablecoin stock is suddenly the hottest trade in crypto
items.summary: The stablecoin issuer has rallied as analysts point to growing demand for USDC, a higher interest-rate environment and the rapid expansion of tokenized assets.
items.title_zh: Circle 一个月内上涨 100%：为什么这只稳定币股票突然成为加密货币中最热门的交易
items.summary_zh: 由于分析师指出对 USDC 的需求不断增长、利率环境上升以及代币化资产的快速扩张，这家稳定币发行商股价上涨。

items.title: The Daily: BlockFills files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy, probe finds document alleging $5M Milei-Libra promotion deal, and more
items.summary: The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.
items.title_zh: 《每日报》：BlockFills 根据美国破产法第 11 章申请破产，调查发现文件指控 500 万美元 Milei-Libra 促销交易等
items.summary_zh: 以下文章改编自 The Block 的时事通讯《The Daily》，该通讯于工作日下午发布。

items.title: Ironlight raises $21 million to expand regulated marketplace for tokenized securities
items.summary: Ironlight’s ATS received approval from FINRA last year to support trading in both traditional and tokenized securities.
items.title_zh: Ironlight 融资 2100 万美元，以扩大代币化证券的监管市场
items.summary_zh: Ironlight 的 ATS 去年获得了 FINRA 的批准，支持传统和代币化证券的交易。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #22.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 22。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #99.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 99。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #39.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 39 名。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Solana (SOL)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #7.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Solana (SOL)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第七。

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: New method could increase LLM training efficiency
items.summary: By leveraging idle computing time, researchers can double the speed of model training while preserving accuracy.
items.title_zh: 新方法可以提高LLM培训效率
items.summary_zh: 通过利用空闲计算时间，研究人员可以将模型训练的速度提高一倍，同时保持准确性。

items.title: Lobster buffet: China’s tech firms feast on OpenClaw as companies race to deploy AI agents
items.summary: China-based usage of OpenClaw has already topped that of the U.S., while driving demand for Chinese lower-cost AI models.
items.title_zh: 龙虾自助餐：中国科技公司竞相部署人工智能代理，享受 OpenClaw 盛宴
items.summary_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 使用量已经超过美国，同时推动了对中国低成本人工智能模型的需求。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation’s new mandate sparks debate about its role, priorities
items.summary: The document quickly sparked debate across the Ethereum community, with supporters saying it reinforces the network’s core principles. Critics, however, argue the mandate signals the foundation intends to take a backseat just as institutional interest in blockchain is acceleratin
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会的新使命引发了关于其角色、优先事项的争论
items.summary_zh: 该文件很快引发了以太坊社区的争论，支持者表示它强化了网络的核心原则。然而，批评者认为，该授权表明基金会打算退居二线，而机构对区块链的兴趣正在加速增长

items.title: Institutions had ‘diamond hands’ during bitcoin's 50% plunge, Bitwise's Matt Hougan says
items.summary: “The wildest thing about my $1 million prediction is that it's not wild at all,” said the digital asset fund manager's CIO.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 的 Matt Hougan 表示，在比特币暴跌 50% 期间，机构持有“钻石手”
items.summary_zh: “关于我的 100 万美元预测，最疯狂的一点是它根本不疯狂，”数字资产基金经理的首席信息官说。

items.title: Bitcoin eyes $75,000, nearing 25% bounce from February bottom
items.summary: Gains came for crypto and stocks as tensions around the Strait of Hormuz appeared to ease slightly, sending oil prices lower.
items.title_zh: 比特币有望触及 75,000 美元，较 2 月底部反弹近 25%
items.summary_zh: 随着霍尔木兹海峡周围的紧张局势似乎略有缓解，导致油价下跌，加密货币和股票上涨。

items.title: HIVE to phase down bitcoin mining in Sweden as it expands AI data center capacity in Canada
items.summary: HIVE said it is progressively phasing down its ASIC-based bitcoin mining operations in Sweden amid tax disputes and operational uncertainty.
items.title_zh: HIVE 将逐步减少瑞典的比特币开采，同时扩大加拿大人工智能数据中心的容量
items.summary_zh: HIVE 表示，由于税务纠纷和运营不确定性，该公司正在逐步停止其在瑞典基于 ASIC 的比特币挖矿业务。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.title_zh: 从模型到代理：为 Responses API 配备计算机环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用响应 API、shell 工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，以使用文件、工具和状态运行安全、可扩展的代理。

items.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
items.summary: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.title_zh: 改善前沿法学硕士的教学层次
items.summary_zh: IH-Challenge 训练模型以优先考虑可信指令，改善指令层次结构、安全可操纵性以及对即时注入攻击的抵抗力。

items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
items.summary: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.
items.title_zh: Codex 安全性：现在处于研究预览阶段
items.summary_zh: Codex Security 是一款 AI 应用程序安全代理，可分析项目上下文，以更高的置信度和更少的噪音来检测、验证和修补复杂的漏洞。

items.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
items.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.
items.title_zh: Descript 如何实现大规模多语言视频配音
items.summary_zh: Descript 使用 OpenAI 模型来扩展多语言视频配音，优化含义和时间的翻译，使配音的语音在不同语言中听起来都很自然。

items.title: The First Healthcare Robotics Dataset and Foundational Physical AI Models for Healthcare Robotics
items.title_zh: 第一个医疗保健机器人数据集和医疗保健机器人基础物理人工智能模型

items.title: PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!
items.title_zh: PRX 第 3 部分 — 在 24 小时内训练文本到图像模型！

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: Google and the Massachusetts AI Hub are launching a new AI training initiative for the Commonwealth.
items.summary: Google is partnering with the Massachusetts AI Hub to provide every Baystater with no-cost access to Google’s AI training.
items.title_zh: 谷歌和马萨诸塞州人工智能中心正在为联邦启动一项新的人工智能培训计划。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在与马萨诸塞州人工智能中心合作，为每个 Baystater 提供免费的谷歌人工智能培训机会。

items.title: Get more context and understand translations more deeply with new AI-powered updates in Translate.
items.summary: New alternatives, “understand” and “ask” buttons in Google Translate help you navigate the complexities of natural language.
items.title_zh: 通过 Translate 中新的人工智能驱动的更新，获取更多背景信息并更深入地理解翻译。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译中的新替代方案“理解”和“询问”按钮可帮助您应对自然语言的复杂性。

items.title: 3 Questions: Building predictive models to characterize tumor progression
items.summary: Assistant Professor Matthew Jones is working to decode molecular processes on the genetic, epigenetic, and microenvironment levels to anticipate how and when tumors evolve to resist treatment.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：建立预测模型来表征肿瘤进展
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Matthew Jones 致力于解码遗传、表观遗传和微环境水平上的分子过程，以预测肿瘤如何以及何时进化以抵抗治疗。

items.title: How Joseph Paradiso’s sensing innovations bridge the arts, medicine, and ecology
items.summary: From early motion-sensing platforms to environmental monitoring, the professor and head of the Program in Media Arts and Sciences has turned decades of cross-disciplinary research into real-world impact.
items.title_zh: Joseph Paradiso 的传感创新如何架起艺术、医学和生态学的桥梁
items.summary_zh: 从早期的运动传感平台到环境监测，这位教授兼媒体艺术与科学项目的负责人将数十年的跨学科研究转化为现实世界的影响。

items.title: Improving AI models’ ability to explain their predictions
items.summary: A new approach could help users know whether to trust a model’s predictions in safety-critical applications like health care and autonomous driving.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能模型解释其预测的能力
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以帮助用户知道是否信任模型在医疗保健和自动驾驶等安全关键应用中的预测。

items.title: China talks up oil sufficiency as Trump seeks Beijing's help on securing Hormuz energy route
items.summary: The statistics bureau said that China's energy supply is "relatively strong," while announcing an uptick in domestic production.
items.title_zh: 特朗普寻求北京帮助确保霍尔木兹能源路线安全，中国谈论石油供应充足
items.summary_zh: 国家统计局表示，中国能源供应“相对强劲”，同时宣布国内产量有所增加。

items.title: Surging oil prices could wipe out benefits from Trump's 'big beautiful bill'
items.summary: Estimates from Wall Street project that if oil prices stay elevated for too long, consumers will lose as much as they gain from the new tax law.
items.title_zh: 油价飙升可能会消除特朗普“大而美丽的法案”带来的好处
items.summary_zh: 华尔街的估计表明，如果油价长期保持高位，消费者从新税法中得到的损失将与他们从新税法中获得的收益一样多。

items.title: Meta and TikTok let harmful content rise after evidence outrage drove engagement, say whistleblowers
items.summary: Companies allowed more harmful content on user’s feeds, knowing their algorithms ran on outrage, BBC hears.
items.title_zh: 举报人称，在有证据表明愤怒推动了参与度之后，Meta 和 TikTok 任由有害内容增加
items.summary_zh: 据英国广播公司 (BBC) 获悉，公司知道他们的算法会激怒用户，因此允许用户的推送中出现更多有害内容。

items.title: Iran hits key UAE oil port and Dubai airport
items.summary: The port of Fujairah plays a crucial role in helping keep global supplies moving when the Strait of Hormuz is blocked.
items.title_zh: 伊朗袭击阿联酋主要石油港口和迪拜机场
items.summary_zh: 当霍尔木兹海峡被封锁时，富查伊拉港在帮助保持全球供应畅通方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

items.title: How US groups are driving a new generation of anti-abortion activism in the UK
items.summary: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?
items.title_zh: 美国团体如何在英国推动新一代反堕胎活动
items.summary_zh: 查理·柯克被杀引发了跨大西洋反对堕胎的运动。但它能成功改变英国支持堕胎的共识吗？

items.summary: The UN is deeply concerned by allegations there have been incidents of torture after Nicolás Maduro's ouster.
items.title_zh: 联合国收到报告称委内瑞拉继续对被拘留者施以酷刑
items.summary_zh: 联合国对尼古拉斯·马杜罗下台后发生的酷刑事件的指控深感关切。

items.title: Whistleblower murder suspect is former elite officer, South African police say
items.summary: Marius van der Merwe was shot dead three weeks after accusing police officers of killing a robbery suspect.
items.title_zh: 南非警方称，举报人谋杀嫌疑人是前精英军官
items.summary_zh: 马吕斯·范德默韦在指控警察杀害一名抢劫嫌疑人三周后被枪杀。

items.title: Russia agrees to stop using Kenyan recruits in Ukraine conflict, Kenya says
items.summary: Some 1,000 Kenyans are believed to have recruited to fight in Ukraine - many say they were lured under false pretences.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚表示，俄罗斯同意停止在乌克兰冲突中使用肯尼亚新兵
items.summary_zh: 据信约有 1,000 名肯尼亚人被招募到乌克兰参战——许多人说他们是被虚假借口所引诱的。

items.summary: Martin Ryan was accused of collecting secret information about Baku's military co-operation with Turkey and Pakistan.
items.title_zh: 法国国民因间谍罪在阿塞拜疆被判入狱 10 年
items.summary_zh: 马丁·瑞安被指控收集有关巴库与土耳其和巴基斯坦军事合作的秘密信息。

items.title: Is Cheburashka, the Beloved Soviet-Born Character, Ruining Russia?
items.summary: Instead of obsessing over the fictional Cheburashka, Russians should be focused on more important things like the rebirth of a Russian empire, influential conservatives say.
items.title_zh: 切布拉什卡（Cheburashka），这位受人喜爱的苏联出生的人物，正在毁掉俄罗斯吗？
items.summary_zh: 有影响力的保守派人士表示，俄罗斯人不应该沉迷于虚构的切布拉什卡，而应该关注更重要的事情，比如俄罗斯帝国的重生。

items.title: SEC’s Hester Peirce encourages firms exploring tokenization to ‘come in and talk to us’
items.summary: Peirce said the SEC isn't a “merit regulator,” emphasizing the agency doesn't decide whether financial products are good or bad investments.

items.title: Polymarket bettors send death threats to reporter over missile report tied to $14 million prediction market pool
items.summary: The threats appear tied to a market contract with more than $14 million wagered on whether Iran carried out a strike on Israel on a specific date.
